form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 410m at Horsham. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.4 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy (22.48), beating Paw Whisper. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after running them ragged to make it two on the trot at this track over 390m (22.43). Looks a key chance on recent form.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Judd, beaten 6 lengths (23.11). Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.04) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Has three wins and five placings from 14 starts from the draw. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 390m at this track. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and lost ground.
Checked shortly after start; Raced with a dislodged muzzle.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Mt Gambier to win by 3 lengths in 17.69, beating Cadillac Magic. Last start finished last on March 19 over 305m at Mt Gambier behind Cheques To Burn beaten 12 lengths (18.30) in a Other. Others make more appeal.
